items.title: Fix Streamlit direct run issue
items.notes: Direct `streamlit run app.py` fails, while launching from the desktop batch file works reliably. Likely environment/path mismatch. Deferred because the batch file is a working workaround.

items.title: Resolve DI Workbench UI inconsistencies and rendering issues
items.notes: Frontend instability and rendering inconsistencies previously surfaced during DI Workbench iteration.

items.title: Add additional Apple device data ingestion
items.notes: Expand beyond current health metrics to include additional Apple device data points such as Screen Time and other relevant signals.

items.title: Build full data ingest layer beyond initial health metrics
items.notes: Needed for broader Behavior OS coverage and future multimodal/personal data ingestion.

items.title: Implement persistent backlog system inside Workbench
items.notes: Artifact-backed JSON backlog has now been created inside the project.

items.title: Normalize package and import paths across engine modules
items.notes: Inconsistent root-vs-engine imports are causing runtime errors during app swaps and launcher differences. Standardize module structure and imports.

items.title: Establish DI Workbench Pattern Library (v1)
items.notes: Define reusable spec patterns (scoring engine, ingestion, insight generation, tool routing) to reduce architect friction, improve reviewer convergence, and enable scalable feature development without repeated spec design.
